pkgmetadata.longdescription: RPCS3 is a free and open-source Sony PlayStation 3 emulator and debugger written in C++ for Windows, Linux and FreeBSD.

use.flag: Enable FAudio backend for accurate XAudio2 emulation
Enable Feral GameMode support for automatic CPU performance tuning during gameplay
Compile with -march=native to enable all CPU-specific optimizations (recommended for local builds only)
